result.stdout:
.NET Core Umbrella TypeScript Generator

Usage: dotnet-umbrella-ts [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information
  --verbose|-v             Show detailed output messages.
  --debug|-d               Show debug messages.
  --input|-i               The physical path to the folder containing the assemblies to scan for TypeScript attributes.
  --assemblies|-a          The names of the assemblies to scan for attributes. If not supplied all assemblies in the folder path will be scanned.
  --runtime-assemblies|-r  The names of the assemblies to load into memory upon which the assemblies being scanned depend.
  --generators|-g          The generators to include: [standard | knockout].
  --type|-t                The output type: [namespace, module]
  --strict|-s              Enable strict null checks
  --property-mode|-p       The TypeScriptPropertyMode to use: [None, Null, Model]. This value is case sensitive.
  --output|-o              The path where the output file will be written.
  --knockout-decorators    Specifies that generated Knockout types will use decorators instead of explicit observables.
  --validation             Specify this flag to enable validation dependencies to be included.

commands.payload:
.NET Core Umbrella TypeScript Generator

Usage: dotnet-umbrella-ts [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information
  --verbose|-v             Show detailed output messages.
  --debug|-d               Show debug messages.
  --input|-i               The physical path to the folder containing the assemblies to scan for TypeScript attributes.
  --assemblies|-a          The names of the assemblies to scan for attributes. If not supplied all assemblies in the folder path will be scanned.
  --runtime-assemblies|-r  The names of the assemblies to load into memory upon which the assemblies being scanned depend.
  --generators|-g          The generators to include: [standard | knockout].
  --type|-t                The output type: [namespace, module]
  --strict|-s              Enable strict null checks
  --property-mode|-p       The TypeScriptPropertyMode to use: [None, Null, Model]. This value is case sensitive.
  --output|-o              The path where the output file will be written.
  --knockout-decorators    Specifies that generated Knockout types will use decorators instead of explicit observables.
  --validation             Specify this flag to enable validation dependencies to be included.
